one_law: Static, table-driven event -> event_type translation only. No reasoning, no synthesis, no cross-event correlation — that is the BRAIN node's future job, not this worker's.

rules.why: sourcea_observe's whole job is observing SourceA state; a push is the ground-truth signal it otherwise waits up to 30 min to notice
self_heal auto-fixes safe issues from audit findings — reactive-to-failure by design, otherwise waits up to 10 min to notice
